channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, Miami's Ward are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night. The Heisman has been given to the nation’s most outstanding college football player since 1935.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MLB Winter Meetings Blog: Bregman & more Astros notes
item.description: The Astros have stated for months their priority is to re-sign Alex Bregman. They have an offer on the table, but a handful of teams have now entered the Bregman race with Juan Soto off the board.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit for opener in Japan, but not be on the mound
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit when the reigning World Series champions open their season in Japan against the Chicago Cubs on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Soto's record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets reverberates through Major League Baseball
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Shortly after striking a record $765 million, 15-year contract for Juan Soto with the New York Mets, agent Scott Boras walked into Nick & Sam's, a restaurant near the winter meetings hotel, with about a dozen of his staff.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM and STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cowboys set to host Bengals under open roof after falling debris thwarted that plan against Texans
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys opened without incident and will stay that way for a Monday night meeting with the Cincinnati Bengals. It was to be the first game with the roof open at AT&T Stadium since Oct. 30, 2022, a 49-29 Dallas victory over Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck's status for Sugar Bowl uncertain as he considers treatment options on elbow
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Quarterback Carson Beck's status for No. 2 Georgia's Sugar Bowl College Football Playoff quarterfinal is uncertain after he suffered an elbow injury in Saturday's Southeastern Conference championship game win over Texas.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: No. 19 Tennessee back in women's AP Top 25 after year out of poll; UCLA, UConn remain 1-2
item.description: Tennessee has returned to The Associated Press Top 25 at No. 19, ending the school's longest drought in the 48-year history of the women's basketball poll. The Lady Vols (7-0) had not been ranked since Nov. 27, 2023, a span of 22 polls.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LIV Golf star Phil Mickelson's 'random thoughts' include Daniel Penny take
item.description: Golf icon Phil Mickelson shared his "random thoughts" on Sunday night, which included a take on Daniel Penny, who is going through a trial in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers' Bryce Young receives praise for prayer as Eagles player suffers injury
item.description: Carolina Panthers quarterback Bryce Young received praise on Sunday for taking a moment to pray when Philadelphia Eagles safety C.J. Gardner-Johnson got hurt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chiefs win AFC West for 9th straight season after game-winning field goal goes their way
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs have won the AFC East for the 9th straight season, and it came on a doinked game-winning field goal by Matthew Wright to beat the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Allen's record day not enough as Bills' 7-game winning streak is snapped by Rams
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — On a day when Josh Allen became the first player to have three touchdown passes and three rushing TDs in the same game, it was a play during which Buffalo's quarterback didn't reach the end zone that was the most discussed after the Bills' 44-42 loss to the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dave Parker, Dick Allen elected to Baseball Hall of Fame via classic era committee
item.description: Dave Parker and Dick Allen are the 2025 classic era committee inductees for the Baseball Hall of Fame after each receiving enough votes on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alabama AD suggests football team will reassess non-conference schedule after missing out on CFP
item.description: Alabama's athletics director suggests it's time for the football team to rethink the non-conference schedule after missing out on the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
